## 📰 Hacker News Highlights / 黑客新闻精选

<!-- [Title-Only] -->
### Vitamin D3 During Pregnancy and Cognitive Performance at 10 Years

* **What this article likely covers:** Based on the title, this appears to be a research study published in JAMA Network Open examining the relationship between vitamin D3 supplementation during pregnancy and children's cognitive development measured at age 10. The study likely investigates whether maternal vitamin D3 intake affects long-term neurodevelopmental outcomes in offspring.

* **Why it might be interesting:** This research addresses a critical question for prenatal health—whether a common, accessible supplement during pregnancy can influence a child's cognitive abilities years later. Given widespread vitamin D deficiency and ongoing debates about supplementation recommendations for pregnant women, this longitudinal study could have significant implications for prenatal care guidelines and public health policy.

---

### 孕期维生素 D3 补充与儿童 10 岁时的认知表现

* **根据标题推测的文章内容：** 这似乎是一项发表在 JAMA Network Open 上的研究，探讨孕期补充维生素 D3 与儿童 10 岁时认知发展之间的关系。该研究可能调查母体维生素 D3 摄入是否会影响后代的长期神经发育结果。

* **为何值得关注：** 这项研究解决了产前健康领域的一个关键问题——孕期补充这种常见且易获取的营养素是否能影响孩子多年后的认知能力。鉴于维生素 D 缺乏现象普遍存在，以及关于孕妇补充剂建议的持续争议，这项纵向研究可能对产前护理指南和公共卫生政策产生重要影响。

**[Read Original / 阅读原文](https://jamanetwork.com/journals/jamanetworkopen/fullarticle/2849122)**

<!-- [Title-Only] -->
### Ripping a DVD, a federal crime in 1999, requires $22 and free software in 2026

**Based on the title only:**

* This article likely explores the evolution of DVD copy protection and circumvention over the past 27 years, contrasting the legal landscape of 1999 (when the DMCA made circumventing CSS encryption a federal crime) with today's reality where DVD ripping has become trivial and accessible
* It probably discusses how technological barriers that once seemed insurmountable have been completely overcome, and may reflect on the effectiveness (or futility) of DRM and copyright enforcement in the digital age
* Why it might be interesting: It illustrates how quickly technology and practical norms can outpace law, and serves as a case study in the tension between copyright protection and fair use in the digital era

---

### 翻录 DVD：1999 年的联邦重罪，2026 年只需 22 美元和免费软件

**仅根据标题推测：**

* 本文很可能探讨了 DVD 拷贝保护和破解技术在过去 27 年间的演变，对比 1999 年的法律环境（当时 DMCA 法案使破解 CSS 加密成为联邦犯罪）与如今 DVD 翻录已变得极其简单和普及的现实
* 文章可能讨论了曾经看似不可逾越的技术壁垒如何被彻底攻克，并可能反思 DRM（数字版权管理）和版权执法在数字时代的有效性（或无效性）
* 为何值得关注：它展示了技术和实际规范如何迅速超越法律，并为数字时代版权保护与合理使用之间的张力提供了一个典型案例研究

**[Read Original / 阅读原文](https://ringmast4r.substack.com/p/in-1999-this-was-a-federal-crime)**

### Cloning a Sennheiser BA2015 Battery Pack: A Cost Analysis

* **The Problem**: Sennheiser's BA2015 battery pack costs $50-$100 but contains only two standard NiMH AA batteries and a $0.02-$0.20 NTC temperature sensor
* **Official Justification**: The pack prevents charging non-rechargeable batteries through a temperature sensor contact that differentiates it from regular AA batteries
* **DIY Solution**: Built a 3D-printed replacement using $2.50/cell Panasonic batteries, an NTC sensor, and custom OpenSCAD-designed case
* **Technical Details**: The pack uses two flat-top cells connected via bent paperclip, a magnet for button contact, and strategically printed orientation to avoid layer stress
* **Economic Reality**: Third-party packs sell for €18, DIY parts cost ~$5-6 per pack for materials
* **Conclusion**: While technically feasible, DIY isn't worth the time investment compared to third-party options, but highlights egregious pricing on official Sennheiser packs

### 克隆森海塞尔 BA2015 电池组:成本分析

* **问题所在**:森海塞尔的 BA2015 电池组售价 50-100 美元,但实际只包含两节标准镍氢 AA 电池和一个价值 0.02-0.20 美元的 NTC 温度传感器
* **官方理由**:该电池组通过温度传感器触点防止对不可充电电池充电,以此与普通 AA 电池区分
* **DIY 方案**:使用 2.50 美元/节的松下电池、NTC 传感器和 OpenSCAD 设计的定制外壳,3D 打印替代品
* **技术细节**:电池组使用两节平头电池通过弯曲回形针连接,磁铁作为按钮触点,打印方向经过优化以避免层应力断裂
* **经济现实**:第三方电池组售价 18 欧元,DIY 材料成本每组约 5-6 美元
* **结论**:虽然技术可行,但 DIY 相比第三方产品不值得投入时间,但这突显了森海塞尔官方电池组的暴利定价

**[Read Original / 阅读原文](https://blog.brixit.nl/cloning-a-sennheiser-ba2015-accu-pack/)**


## 🔥 GitHub Trending / GitHub 热门项目

### last30days-skill - AI-Powered Multi-Platform Research Agent

* **What it does**: Aggregates and synthesizes information from Reddit, X (Twitter), YouTube, TikTok, Hacker News, Polymarket, GitHub, and other platforms, ranking content by real user engagement (upvotes, likes, money-backed predictions) rather than SEO algorithms
* **Key features**: Zero-config setup; parallel multi-platform search with intelligent source detection; AI-driven synthesis that scores by social signals; exports shareable HTML briefs; works across 50+ agent platforms (Claude, Cursor, Copilot, etc.); accesses data Google/ChatGPT/Gemini can't reach individually
* **Why it's notable**: Bridges walled-garden platforms into a unified search layer powered by AI agents, surfacing real-time community consensus and cultural signals that traditional search engines miss. Practical use cases include pre-meeting research, trend analysis, product comparisons, and trip planning—all grounded in what people actually engage with across disconnected social platforms

---

### last30days-skill - AI 驱动的多平台研究智能体

* **功能介绍**: 聚合并综合来自 Reddit、X (Twitter)、YouTube、TikTok、Hacker News、Polymarket、GitHub 等平台的信息,根据真实用户参与度(点赞、转发、资金支持的预测)而非 SEO 算法对内容进行排序
* **主要特点**: 零配置启动;智能源检测的并行多平台搜索;基于社交信号评分的 AI 综合分析;可导出可分享的 HTML 报告;支持 50+ 智能体平台(Claude、Cursor、Copilot 等);访问 Google/ChatGPT/Gemini 单独无法触及的数据
* **为何值得关注**: 将各个封闭平台桥接成由 AI 智能体驱动的统一搜索层,挖掘传统搜索引擎遗漏的实时社区共识和文化信号。实用场景包括会前调研、趋势分析、产品对比和旅行规划——所有结论均基于人们在各分散社交平台上的真实参与行为

**[View Repository / 查看仓库](https://github.com/mvanhorn/last30days-skill)**

### OpenCV - Open Source Computer Vision Library

* **What it does**: OpenCV is a comprehensive open-source library for computer vision and machine learning, providing tools for image processing, object detection, face recognition, video analysis, and real-time computer vision applications across multiple platforms.

* **Key features**: Supports 2500+ optimized algorithms for classical and deep learning-based computer vision tasks; cross-platform compatibility (Windows, Linux, macOS, Android, iOS); bindings for C++, Python, Java; real-time processing capabilities; extensive documentation and active community support with Q&A forums and regular YouTube livestreams.

* **Why it's notable**: As the de facto standard computer vision library with 89 stars gained today, OpenCV powers countless AI and robotics applications worldwide. Backed by a strong ecosystem including opencv_contrib for additional modules, professional training courses, and commercial support through OpenCV.ai, it remains the go-to choice for developers and researchers working on vision-based projects.

---

### OpenCV - 开源计算机视觉库

* **功能介绍**: OpenCV 是一个全面的开源计算机视觉和机器学习库,提供图像处理、物体检测、人脸识别、视频分析和实时计算机视觉应用的工具,支持多平台部署。

* **主要特点**: 包含 2500+ 个优化算法,涵盖经典和深度学习计算机视觉任务;跨平台兼容(Windows、Linux、macOS、Android、iOS);提供 C++、Python、Java 等语言绑定;具备实时处理能力;拥有完善的文档、活跃的社区论坛和定期 YouTube 直播节目。

* **为何值得关注**: 作为计算机视觉领域的事实标准库(今日新增 89 星标),OpenCV 为全球无数 AI 和机器人应用提供支持。拥有强大的生态系统,包括 opencv_contrib 扩展模块、专业培训课程以及 OpenCV.ai 提供的商业支持,是开发者和研究人员进行视觉项目开发的首选工具。

**[View Repository / 查看仓库](https://github.com/opencv/opencv)**

### Taste-Skill - Anti-Slop AI Frontend Framework

* **What it does**: A collection of portable "Agent Skills" that teach AI coding assistants (ChatGPT, Cursor, Claude) to generate high-quality, non-generic user interfaces with proper typography, layout, motion, and spacing instead of boring boilerplate designs.

* **Key features**: 
  - Modular skill system - install individual skills via CLI for different use cases (frontend, mobile, brand kits, redesigns)
  - V2 experimental version with design language inference and three tunable dials (variance/motion/density)
  - Image-generation skills that create reference boards before coding
  - Multiple visual styles: minimalist, brutalist, soft/premium, industrial
  - Works with popular AI coding tools (Codex, Cursor, Claude Code)
  - Includes output enforcement to prevent truncated code

* **Why it's notable**: Addresses a common pain point in AI-generated code - bland, generic-looking UIs that all look the same. With 1,104 stars today, it's trending because it gives developers a practical solution to add "taste" and design quality to AI-assisted development workflows. The framework is particularly timely as AI coding assistants become mainstream but still struggle with aesthetic judgment.

---

### Taste-Skill - AI 前端反"废话"框架

* **功能介绍**: 一套可移植的"Agent 技能"集合,教会 AI 编码助手(ChatGPT、Cursor、Claude)生成高质量、非千篇一律的用户界面,具备合理的排版、布局、动效和间距,而非无聊的样板式设计。

* **主要特点**:
  - 模块化技能系统 - 通过 CLI 为不同场景安装独立技能(前端、移动端、品牌工具包、重设计)
  - V2 实验版本,支持设计语言推断和三个可调节参数(变化度/动效/密度)
  - 图像生成技能可在编码前创建参考设计板
  - 多种视觉风格:极简主义、粗野主义、柔和/高端、工业风
  - 兼容主流 AI 编码工具(Codex、Cursor、Claude Code)
  - 包含输出强制功能防止代码被截断

* **为何值得关注**: 解决了 AI 生成代码中的常见痛点 - 平淡、千篇一律的 UI 界面。今日获得 1,104 星标,其热度源于为开发者提供了实用解决方案,在 AI 辅助开发工作流中注入"品味"和设计品质。随着 AI 编码助手成为主流但仍在美学判断上存在不足,这个框架的出现恰逢其时。

**[View Repository / 查看仓库](https://github.com/Leonxlnx/taste-skill)**


## 🚀 Fast-Moving Repos / 快速崛起项目

### Goose - Local-First WHOOP 5.0 Companion App

* **What it does**: An iOS app that connects directly to WHOOP 5.0 fitness bands via Bluetooth, processes health data locally through a Rust core, and displays daily metrics for sleep, recovery, strain, stress, cardio, and energy without relying on WHOOP's cloud services.

* **Key features**: SwiftUI interface with health dashboards and trend analysis; Rust-powered data pipeline for performance; HealthKit integration; Live Activity widgets for workouts; local-first architecture that keeps all health data on-device; coach surfaces for metric summaries.

* **Why it's notable**: An ambitious independent reverse-engineering effort targeting WHOOP's premium fitness tracker with 2.2K stars. Offers privacy-focused, local data ownership as an alternative to WHOOP's subscription service. Still in alpha (proof-of-concept stage) for developers only, demonstrating the viability of building third-party companion apps for proprietary wearables through Bluetooth protocol analysis.

---

### Goose - WHOOP 5.0 本地数据伴侣应用

* **功能介绍**: 一款 iOS 应用,通过蓝牙直连 WHOOP 5.0 健身手环,利用 Rust 核心在本地处理健康数据,展示睡眠、恢复、压力、心血管负荷等每日指标,无需依赖 WHOOP 云服务。

* **主要特点**: SwiftUI 界面配备健康仪表板和趋势分析;Rust 驱动的高性能数据处理管道;HealthKit 集成;运动实况组件;本地优先架构保证所有健康数据留存设备;教练界面提供指标摘要。

* **为何值得关注**: 获得 2.2K 星标的独立逆向工程项目,针对 WHOOP 高端健身追踪器提供注重隐私的本地数据所有权方案,可作为 WHOOP 订阅服务的替代选择。目前处于 alpha 概念验证阶段(仅面向开发者),展示了通过蓝牙协议分析为专有可穿戴设备构建第三方伴侣应用的可行性。

**[View Repository / 查看仓库](https://github.com/b-nnett/goose)**

### Skylight - Real-time Aircraft Ceiling Projection System

* **What it does**: Skylight turns your ceiling into a live air traffic display by decoding ADS-B signals from an RTL-SDR radio and projecting overhead aircraft in real-time through a ceiling-pointed projector. It creates an "X-ray view" through your roof, showing planes with their airline, aircraft type, and destination as they physically pass overhead.

* **Key features**: Type-aware aircraft glyphs (helicopters spin rotors, props rotate), smooth 60fps interpolation from 1Hz position data, real sky layer with sun/moon/stars/ISS at true positions, phone-based control panel for live tuning, airport runway overlays, destination arcs showing where each plane is headed with local time and distance, and works with either local RTL-SDR hardware or a free web API.

* **Why it's notable**: This is a unique blend of software-defined radio, real-time visualization, and astronomical computation that transforms raw ADS-B data into a mesmerizing ambient display. It's appliance-ready (boots directly on Raspberry Pi 5), works anywhere globally, and bridges physical aircraft overhead with their digital representation. The project combines practical hardware hacking with elegant rendering—helicopters actually spin their rotors, and you can watch planes align with real runway positions. With 2.2K stars and an upcoming crowdfunding kit, it's hitting a sweet spot between hobbyist SDR projects and consumer-ready ambient displays.

---

### Skylight - 实时飞机天花板投影系统

* **功能介绍**: Skylight 将你的天花板变成实时空中交通显示屏，通过 RTL-SDR 无线电解码 ADS-B 信号，并使用朝上投影仪实时投射头顶飞机。它创建了一个穿透屋顶的"X光视图"，在飞机实际飞过时显示其航空公司、机型和目的地信息。

* **主要特点**: 识别机型的飞机图标(直升机旋转旋翼、螺旋桨飞机转动螺旋桨)，从 1Hz 位置数据平滑插值到 60fps，真实天空图层显示太阳/月亮/星星/国际空间站的真实位置，手机控制面板实时调节参数，机场跑道叠加层，目的地弧线显示每架飞机的目的地及当地时间和距离，支持本地 RTL-SDR 硬件或免费 Web API。

* **为何值得关注**: 这是一个独特的项目，融合了软件无线电、实时可视化和天文计算，将原始 ADS-B 数据转化为迷人的环境显示。它可作为即用设备(直接在树莓派 5 上启动)，在全球任何地方运行，并将头顶的物理飞机与数字呈现连接起来。该项目结合了实用的硬件黑客技术和优雅的渲染效果——直升机真的会旋转旋翼，你可以看到飞机与真实跑道位置对齐。拥有 2.2K 星标并即将推出众筹套件，它在业余 SDR 项目和消费级环境显示之间找到了完美平衡点。

**[View Repository / 查看仓库](https://github.com/cpaczek/skylight)**

### 🎬 Father of the iPod and iPhone on building taste, judgment, and creativity in the AI era

**Channel:** Lenny's Podcast

* What the video covers: Tony Fadell, creator of the iPod and co-creator of the iPhone, shares insights on product development, leadership, and navigating the intersection of human creativity and artificial intelligence
* Key topics discussed: Building taste and judgment in product design, the role of creativity in an AI-dominated future, lessons from creating iconic consumer products at Apple, and entrepreneurial wisdom from founding and scaling Nest to a $3.2B Google acquisition
* Why it's worth watching: Rare deep-dive conversation with one of tech's most influential product visionaries; actionable insights on developing design intuition and maintaining human creativity as AI tools become ubiquitous; essential listening for product managers, designers, and founders
